extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[B]*** This will probably be the last [COLOR red]The Red Wizard[/COLOR] update to FenLightAM - [COLOR red]UNOFFICIAL[/COLOR] ***[/B]
FenLightAM - UNOFFICIAL is now fully working and all functionality has been restored. We will not revoke our Trakt or TMDb keys because someone says something we do not like on Reddit. FenLightAM - UNOFFICIAL has been tested with Kodi 22 Omega and should work perfectly for a very long time.
While I am grateful to Tikipeter and his various pseudonyms and aliases for creating and maintaining Fen and FenLight/FenLightAM, his actions are negatively impacting Kodi end-users. He will do it again. I am proud to have bypassed Tikipeter's block of TMDb Helper.
When the time comes (and as of 13th May 2026), I suggest moving to one of:
* Red Light from The Red Repo - fully maintained fork of FenLight * The Gears from the Chains Repository - fully maintained fork of FenLightAM * POV from the Kodifitzwell repository - fully maintained fork of Fen * Umbrella from the Umbrella Repository - fully maintained fork of Venom
Many thanks to the developers who assisted with the TMDb Helper patch and restoring the icons. They would prefer to remain AnonyMouse ;) but they know who they are.
